column1: この雨はなかなか止みそうにない。
column2: このあめはなかなかやみそうにない。
column3: This rain doesn't look like it'll stop anytime soon.
column4: そうにない (unlikely to, doesn't look like it will, showing no signs of)
column5: Verb[ます-stem] + そうにない / そうもない
column6: expresses that based on current appearance or circumstances, something seems very unlikely to happen
column7: そうにない: rain shows no sign of stopping
column8: そうにない = unlikely based on appearances; そうだ = looks like it will; ようにない = same as そうにない (interchangeable); はずがない = impossible (expectation-based)
